  "findings": [
    "Thermal signature (IR modality) indicates high resistance heating at the termination",
    "Insufficient torque on the terminal connection"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the circuit and lock out/tag out (LOTO)",
    "Inspect the terminal and conductor for thermal damage or degradation",
    "Re-terminate using a calibrated torque tool to the manufacturer's specified torque values"
  ],
  "rationale": "The thermal signature indicates high resistance heating caused by insufficient torque on the termination. This is a violation of NEC 110.14(D), which requires terminal connection torque to be verified with a calibrated tool. If left uncorrected, this condition poses a high risk of fire, equipment damage, or localized failure.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 110.14(D)"
  ]
}
